name: Check Cashing & Cigarettes
description_short: Check Cashing & Cigarettes offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services at their West Sacramento location with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
Check Cashing & Cigarettes operates as a financial services convenience business located at 3017 W Capitol Ave in West Sacramento, California. The company provides essential cash-handling services to consumers who may not have traditional banking relationships or need immediate access to funds. Based on the available information, the business positions itself as a one-stop location for multiple financial transaction needs beyond typical bank services.

The company offers check cashing as its primary service, supplemented by money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment processing. These services are designed to serve unbanked and underbanked populations who rely on alternative financial services. The combination of check cashing with retail sales (cigarettes) suggests a convenience-oriented business model that caters to walk-in customers seeking quick financial transactions.

Check Cashing & Cigarettes distinguishes itself through extended operating hours compared to many traditional banks. The business operates Monday through Thursday from 10 AM to 6 PM, Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 3 PM, providing accessibility for customers with non-traditional schedules. The phone number (916) 375-1000 is available for customer inquiries regarding fees and services.

As a check cashing business, this company serves a specific market segment but does not appear to offer credit-building products, loans, or financial counseling. Customers should verify current fee structures and service availability by calling directly, as specific pricing information is not available from the website content. The business is straightforward in its service offerings without premium features or digital banking capabilities.
address: 3017 W Capitol Ave, West Sacramento, CA 95691

company_info.headquarters: 3017 W Capitol Ave, West Sacramento, CA 95691

pros: Extended hours including Friday morning openings at 9 AM and Saturday availability
Multiple financial services in one location (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment)
Local West Sacramento presence with direct phone line for customer service
Saturday operating hours accommodate weekend-working populations
Convenient walk-in service without appointment requirements
cons: No website or online service information provided; limited digital presence and ordering capabilities
Check cashing fees and service charges not disclosed; customers must call to inquire about rates
Limited to one physical location in West Sacramento with no apparent branch network
No credit-building products or financial counseling services offered
Saturday hours close relatively early at 3 PM, limiting afternoon access on weekends
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals needing immediate check cashing without bank accounts
Workers with non-traditional schedules requiring early morning or weekend financial services
Customers sending domestic or international wire transfers and needing quick processing
diagnosis: Check Cashing & Cigarettes is best for unbanked consumers and workers with non-traditional schedules who need immediate check cashing and basic financial transaction services. The main caveat is that the company does not offer credit products, online services, or financial counseling, and customers must call for fee information.
